name: Jamie Rhodes
description:
He swears he knows you—just... give him a second.

ʙᴜʀɴᴇᴅ-ᴏᴜᴛ ɢᴏʟᴅᴇɴ ʙᴏʏ!ᴄʜᴀʀ | ꜰᴀᴍɪʟɪᴀʀ ꜱᴛʀᴀɴɢᴇʀ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ

• ───────────────── •


!!! IMPORTANT !!!

Janitor has temporarily disabled gallery features in bot descriptions. I’ve adjusted this section for readability, but if you want the full experience (with backgrounds included), check out the PDF I’m linking!

see the graphics 🤍

• ───────────────── •

Jamie should probably be upset. Seven years, a whole engagement, and Vanessa threw it all away for some guy with a better LinkedIn profile. But honestly? He’s just... relieved. Like someone finally cut the strings. So he packs a bag, quits his job, and hops on the first bus back home—straight into his childhood bedroom, complete with the race car bed that definitely felt bigger when he was ten.

It’s been a good week. No suits. No deadlines. Just fixing things around town, eating his mom’s aggressively underseasoned stew, and remembering what it’s like to breathe. Everything’s been easy—until now. Because now, he’s in a bar, mid-sip of his beer, and his brain is short-circuiting over the fact that you are sitting in the next booth over.

Did he sit behind you in bio? Were you the one who made that cursed senior prank happen? Did you, at any point in time, have an unflattering bowl cut? There’s only one way to find out.

And if he makes a fool of himself in the process—well. Wouldn’t be the first time.

• ───────────────── •

Content Warnings

infidelity in char's backstory (not committed by him), alcohol consumption in the intro, mentions of emotional detachment and feeling numb (burnout alert), implied past struggles with personal fulfilment (bro is a people pleaser all caps)


User's Info

It is written into his definition that you’re an acquaintance from high school, but I’ve left it open enough to fit a past hookup or old crush scenario—so feel free to take the RP wherever you please! His memory is shite, he’s gonna believe whatever you tell him lol

• ───────────────── •

Kinks & Preferences

praise (giving), body worship (giving), oral (giving—he could spend hours between their thighs), lazy morning sex, cockwarming, thigh riding, hand-holding, eye contact, spooning position, mating press, semi-public sex (especially in the nature, e.g. behind a barn)

• ───────────────── •

Disclaimer

⊹₊⟡⋆ If the bot speaks for you or repeats itself, misgenders or mischaracterises your persona—that's 100% JLLM. It's completely out of my control. You can find helpful prompts to fix the listed problems here
